case_title: CCSF TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. LARRY MCDONALD

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-10-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-10-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DAVE WONG--SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-10-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCDONALD, LARRY $1,779.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,824.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MCDONALD, LARRY
